tenant.title: Tenants
tenant.subtitle: Select a tenant to manage its workspaces
tenant.emptyDescription: There are no tenants configured yet.

workspace.createSubtitle: Add a new workspace to this tenant
workspace.emptyDescription: Create your first workspace to get started.
workspace.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" ({{id}})? This action cannot be undone.

agent.title: Agents
agent.subtitle: Design, version, and publish tenant-scoped agents
agent.emptyDescription: Agents created in workspaces will appear here.

evaluation.title: Evaluations
evaluation.subtitle: Compare revisions, enforce gates, and monitor regressions
evaluation.emptyDescription: Evaluation definitions and runs will appear here.

provider.title: Providers
provider.subtitle: Manage model provider accounts, credential references, and tenant policy
provider.emptyDescription: Provider accounts and credential references will appear here.
provider.workspaceBindingsSubtitle: Workspace-scoped model access and credential references
provider.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Tenant provider accounts can be bound to this workspace when policy is configured.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Design, version, and publish tenant-scoped agents
agents.description: This area will become the workspace for visual orchestration, runtime configuration, release management, and run debugging.
items: Agent list, revisions, and release channels
Visual orchestration studio backed by deterministic artifacts
Run debugging with inputs, outputs, traces, and worker results

evaluations.title: Evaluations
evaluations.subtitle: Compare revisions, enforce gates, and monitor regressions
evaluations.description: This area will make evaluation a first-class product loop rather than a secondary resource view.
items: Baseline comparison with score and gate deltas
Release gates and online regression monitoring

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage model providers, credentials, and capability policy
providers.description: This area will expose provider capability matrices, credential references, and tenant policy for domestic and global model providers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control tenant governance, collaboration, and audit posture
settings.description: This area will collect product-level settings that belong in the manager database rather than Kubernetes CRDs.
items: Users, teams, roles, and workspace membership
Audit retention and product integration settings
